string.text: SP-8 Machete
SP8, a survival machete made from a single piece of high-carbon steel.
United Cutlery M48 Kukri
The M48 series tactical kukri made by "United Cutlery". It features a stainless steel blade and a rubberized handle. A perfect addition to any survivalist’s arsenal!
Monolith Knife
A strangely shaped knife with mysterious markings, taken from a Monolith member. Apparently used as a ritual blade, but that doesn’t seem to be its only purpose.
Taiga-1 Machete
A truly versatile survival tool. It's a weapon, a shovel, an axe — anything you can imagine. It was developed and produced in the USSR for various agencies.
6X5 Bayonet Knife
The 6X5 bayonet knife was adopted in 1989 for use with AK-74 rifles. Not suitable for skinning thick-skinned mutants.
SOG Voodoo Hawk Tomahawk
The SOG Voodoo Hawk combines three top features: an extended cutting head, a compact fiberglass-reinforced nylon handle, and a metal pommel at the end.
Bars A-2607 Damascus
The Bars A-2607 knife is made of Damascus steel with a wenge wood handle and a brass guard.
Bars A-2607 95x18
The Bars A-2607 knife is forged from 95X18 steel with a handle made of fine wood and a brass guard. Not suitable for skinning thick-skinned mutants.
Miller Bros. Blades M-2
The "M-2" tactical sword made by Miller Bros.
Sapper's Shovel
A durable, military-style entrenching tool used by sappers. Can be used for digging, chopping, and in desperate times — as a brutal melee weapon.
